/owners/mordecai-kremer/
← The register
Former owner

Rabbi Mordecai Kremer (Kaunas)

A rabbi of Kaunas (Kovno), Lithuania, whose personal library the Nazis seized. The Katz Center holds roughly 118 of the 162 known books from it — one of five cases where more than seventy percent of an identified personal library survived, together, in this collection. His stamped volumes are flagged on the Lithuanian sheet of the register.

In the victim databases
